prompt: At medium closure threshold, choose call.
why_v1: Call controls risk when stack depth does not support a raise.
feedback_correct_v1: Correct. Calling fits because the closure threshold is still medium, so the line should protect depth instead of forcing pressure too early.
feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. Call is better when the river-depth threshold stays medium, because controlling risk matters more than forcing a raise without enough support.
